message.content:
Add CLPP panel types to the dashboard system in the CLPP webui at /home/junhao/workspace/clpp/components/webui.

## Context
The dashboard system has a panel plugin architecture. Panels are registered in a builtin file that maps panel type strings to their rendering components and configuration.

## Task 1: Find the panel registration system

1. Check `apps/webui/src/features/dashboard/panels/builtin.ts` — this is where panel types are registered
2. Check `packages/common/src/dashboard/types.ts` and `packages/common/src/dashboard/schemas.ts` — these define the PanelType union and schemas
3. Read these files to understand the current panel registration pattern

## Task 2: Add logtype-stats panel type

Add a `logtype-stats` panel type that reuses the existing PatternsTab component:
1. In `packages/common/src/dashboard/types.ts` (or wherever PanelType is defined): add `"logtype-stats"` to the PanelType union
2. In `packages/common/src/dashboard/schemas.ts` (or wherever panel schemas are defined): add the logtype-stats panel schema if needed
3. In `apps/webui/src/features/dashboard/panels/builtin.ts`: register the `logtype-stats` panel type that renders the PatternsTab component

Import PatternsTab from `@/features/clpp/components/patterns-tab`.

## Task 3: Add schema-tree panel type

Add a `schema-tree` panel type that reuses the SchemaTab component:
1. Add `"schema-tree"` to the PanelType union
2. Add the schema-tree panel schema if needed
3. Register the `schema-tree` panel type in builtin.ts

Import SchemaTab from `@/features/clpp/components/schema-tab`.

## Important Notes
- Read existing code first before modifying
- Follow the exact pattern used by existing panel types
- Both panel types should only be available when experimental mode is ON (check `useClppSettingsStore`)
- Use `@/` path alias for imports
- Don't break existing panel types

content.text: I'll start by reading the key files to understand the current panel registration pattern.

content.content:
1	import {Type, type Static} from "@sinclair/typebox";
2	
3	/** Grid position schema */
4	export const GridPosSchema = Type.Object({
5	  x: Type.Integer({minimum: 0, maximum: 11}),
6	  y: Type.Integer({minimum: 0}),
7	  w: Type.Integer({minimum: 1, maximum: 12}),
8	  h: Type.Integer({minimum: 1}),
9	});
10	
11	/** Panel type enum */
12	export const PanelTypeSchema = Type.Union([
13	  Type.Literal("timeseries"),
14	  Type.Literal("stat"),
15	  Type.Literal("table"),
16	  Type.Literal("barchart"),
17	  Type.Literal("logs"),
18	  Type.Literal("markdown"),
19	  Type.Literal("gauge"),
20	  Type.Literal("heatmap"),
21	  Type.Literal("piechart"),
22	  Type.Literal("row"),
23	]);
24	
25	/** Datasource type enum */
26	export const DatasourceTypeSchema = Type.Union([
27	  Type.Literal("mysql"),
28	  Type.Literal("clp"),
29	  Type.Literal("infinity"),
30	]);
31	
32	/** Datasource reference schema */
33	export const DatasourceRefSchema = Type.Object({
34	  type: DatasourceTypeSchema,
35	  uid: Type.String({minLength: 1, maxLength: 32}),
36	});
37	
38	/** Panel query schema */
39	export const PanelQuerySchema = Type.Object({
40	  refId: Type.String({minLength: 1}),
41	  datasource: DatasourceRefSchema,
42	  query: Type.Any(),
43	});
44	
45	/** Dashboard variable schema */
46	export const DashboardVariableSchema = Type.Object({
47	  id: Type.String({minLength: 1}),
48	  name: Type.String({minLength: 1}),
49	  label: Type.Optional(Type.String()),
50	  type: Type.Union([
51	    Type.Literal("query"),
52	    Type.Literal("custom"),
53	    Type.Literal("textbox"),
54	    Type.Literal("datasource"),
55	    Type.Literal("interval"),
56	  ]),
57	  defaultValue: Type.Optional(Type.Any()),
58	  current: Type.Optional(Type.Object({
59	    value: Type.Any(),
60	    text: Type.String(),
61	  })),
62	  options: Type.Optional(Type.Array(Type.Object({
63	    value: Type.Any(),
64	    text: Type.String(),
65	    selected: Type.Boolean(),
66	  }))),
67	  datasource: Type.Optional(DatasourceRefSchema),
68	  query: Type.Optional(Type.String()),
69	  multi: Type.Optional(Type.Boolean()),
70	  includeAll: Type.Optional(Type.Boolean()),
71	  dependsOn: Type.Optional(Type.Array(Type.String())),
72	});
73	
74	/** Time range schema */
75	export const DashboardTimeRangeSchema = Type.Object({
76	  from: Type.String({minLength: 1}),
77	  to: Type.String({minLength: 1}),
78	});
79	
80	/** Panel schema */
81	export const DashboardPanelSchema = Type.Object({
82	  id: Type.String({minLength: 1}),
83	  type: PanelTypeSchema,
84	  title: Type.String(),
85	  description: Type.Optional(Type.String()),
86	  gridPos: GridPosSchema,
87	  datasource: DatasourceRefSchema,
88	  queries: Type.Array(PanelQuerySchema),
89	  options: Type.Record(Type.String(), Type.Any()),
90	  fieldConfig: Type.Optional(Type.Any()),
91	  schemaVersion: Type.Optional(Type.Integer()),
92	  timeFrom: Type.Optional(Type.String()),
93	  transparent: Type.Optional(Type.Boolean()),
94	  repeatVariable: Type.Optional(Type.String()),
95	  collapsed: Type.Optional(Type.Boolean()),
96	  tabId: Type.Optional(Type.String()),
97	});
98	
99	/** Dashboard tab schema */
100	export const DashboardTabSchema = Type.Object({
101	  id: Type.String({minLength: 1}),
102	  order: Type.Integer({minimum: 1}),
103	  title: Type.String(),
104	});
105	
106	/** Annotation schema */
107	export const AnnotationSchema = Type.Object({
108	  id: Type.String({minLength: 1}),
109	  time: Type.Number(),
110	  timeEnd: Type.Optional(Type.Number()),
111	  title: Type.String(),
112	  tags: Type.Optional(Type.Array(Type.String())),
113	  color: Type.Optional(Type.String()),
114	});
115	
116	/** Create dashboard request */
117	export const CreateDashboardSchema = Type.Object({
118	  uid: Type.Optional(Type.String({minLength: 1, maxLength: 32})),
119	  title: Type.String({minLength: 1, maxLength: 255}),
120	  description: Type.Optional(Type.String()),
121	  tags: Type.Optional(Type.Array(Type.String())),
122	  variables: Type.Optional(Type.Array(DashboardVariableSchema)),
123	  timeRange: Type.Optional(DashboardTimeRangeSchema),
124	  refreshInterval: Type.Optional(Type.String()),
125	  panels: Type.Optional(Type.Array(DashboardPanelSchema)),
126	  tabs: Type.Optional(Type.Array(DashboardTabSchema)),
127	  annotations: Type.Optional(Type.Array(AnnotationSchema)),
128	});
129	
130	export type CreateDashboardRequest = Static<typeof CreateDashboardSchema>;
131	
132	/** Update dashboard request */
133	export const UpdateDashboardSchema = Type.Object({
134	  title: Type.Optional(Type.String({minLength: 1, maxLength: 255})),
135	  description: Type.Optional(Type.String()),
136	  tags: Type.Optional(Type.Array(Type.String())),
137	  variables: Type.Optional(Type.Array(DashboardVariableSchema)),
138	  timeRange: Type.Optional(DashboardTimeRangeSchema),
139	  refreshInterval: Type.Optional(Type.String()),
140	  panels: Type.Optional(Type.Array(DashboardPanelSchema)),
141	  tabs: Type.Optional(Type.Array(DashboardTabSchema)),
142	  annotations: Type.Optional(Type.Array(AnnotationSchema)),
143	  version: Type.Integer({minimum: 1}),
144	});
145	
146	export type UpdateDashboardRequest = Static<typeof UpdateDashboardSchema>;
147	
148	/** Dashboard response */
149	export const DashboardResponseSchema = Type.Object({
150	  id: Type.String(),
151	  uid: Type.String(),
152	  title: Type.String(),
153	  description: Type.Optional(Type.String()),
154	  tags: Type.Array(Type.String()),
155	  variables: Type.Array(DashboardVariableSchema),
156	  timeRange: DashboardTimeRangeSchema,
157	  refreshInterval: Type.Optional(Type.String()),
158	  panels: Type.Array(DashboardPanelSchema),
159	  tabs: Type.Optional(Type.Array(DashboardTabSchema)),
160	  annotations: Type.Optional(Type.Array(AnnotationSchema)),
161	  version: Type.Integer(),
162	  updatedAt: Type.String(),
163	  createdAt: Type.String(),
164	});
165	
166	/** Dashboard summary (for list endpoint) */
167	export const DashboardSummarySchema = Type.Object({
168	  id: Type.String(),
169	  uid: Type.String(),
170	  title: Type.String(),
171	  tags: Type.Array(Type.String()),
172	  updatedAt: Type.String(),
173	});
174	
175	/** Datasource instance schema */
176	export const DatasourceInstanceSchema = Type.Object({
177	  id: Type.String(),
178	  uid: Type.String(),
179	  name: Type.String({minLength: 1, maxLength: 255}),
180	  type: DatasourceTypeSchema,
181	  config: Type.Record(Type.String(), Type.Any()),
182	  isDefault: Type.Boolean(),
183	  createdAt: Type.String(),
184	  updatedAt: Type.String(),
185	});
186	
187	/** Create datasource request */
188	export const CreateDatasourceSchema = Type.Object({
189	  uid: Type.Optional(Type.String({minLength: 1, maxLength: 32})),
190	  name: Type.String({minLength: 1, maxLength: 255}),
191	  type: DatasourceTypeSchema,
192	  config: Type.Record(Type.String(), Type.Any()),
193	  isDefault: Type.Optional(Type.Boolean()),
194	});
195	
196	export type CreateDatasourceRequest = Static<typeof CreateDatasourceSchema>;
197	
198	/** Update datasource request */
199	export const UpdateDatasourceSchema = Type.Object({
200	  name: Type.Optional(Type.String({minLength: 1, maxLength: 255})),
201	  config: Type.Optional(Type.Record(Type.String(), Type.Any())),
202	  isDefault: Type.Optional(Type.Boolean()),
203	});
204	
205	export type UpdateDatasourceRequest = Static<typeof UpdateDatasourceSchema>;
206

content.text:
Here is a summary of all changes made across 5 files:

**1. `/home/junhao/workspace/clpp/components/webui/packages/common/src/dashboard/types.ts`** -- Added `"logtype-stats"` and `"schema-tree"` to the `PanelType` union type.

**2. `/home/junhao/workspace/clpp/components/webui/packages/common/src/dashboard/schemas.ts`** -- Added `Type.Literal("logtype-stats")` and `Type.Literal("schema-tree")` to the `PanelTypeSchema` union.

**3. `/home/junhao/workspace/clpp/components/webui/apps/webui/src/features/dashboard/plugins/registry.ts`** -- Added `experimental?: boolean` field to `PanelPluginMeta` interface.

**4. `/home/junhao/workspace/clpp/components/webui/apps/webui/src/features/dashboard/panels/builtin.ts`** -- Added two new lazy-loaded panel components:
- `LazyLogtypeStatsPanel` importing `PatternsTab` from `@/features/clpp/components/patterns-tab`
- `LazySchemaTreePanel` importing `SchemaTab` from `@/features/clpp/components/schema-tab`

Added two new plugin entries to `builtinPlugins`:
- `logtype-stats` -- "Logtype Stats", icon `ListTree`, `requiresQuery: false`, `experimental: true`
- `schema-tree` -- "Schema Tree", icon `GitBranch`, `requiresQuery: false`, `experimental: true`

**5. `/home/junhao/workspace/clpp/components/webui/apps/webui/src/features/dashboard/components/add-panel-dialog.tsx`** -- Imported `useClppSettingsStore` and added filtering logic: experimental panels (those with `meta.experimental: true`) are hidden from the Add Panel dialog unless CLPP experimental mode is enabled. Also added `ListTree` and `GitBranch` icon mappings.
